localizations.title: Scheherazade's last tale
localizations.hiddenObject_1: Look closely at the window overlooking the souk.
localizations.hiddenObject_2: The magic lamp holds many secrets.
localizations.code_1421: After an encouraging click, the door opens with a creaking.
localizations.code_1827: The desert stone shows you the path to the cave.
localizations.code_8127: The desert stone shows you the path to the cave.
localizations.code_84711: This last tale delighted the Vizier. Scheherazade is saved!
localizations.hint_1: The first monkey plays flute, the second doesn't hear the tiger, and the third is dexterous.
localizations.hint_3: This snake would let you pass if you'd find an object to charm it.
localizations.hint_4: The inscription is your starting point. Using the pattern on machine 26, do all the calculation in the right order to get a new card number.
localizations.hint_5: This flute plays a hypnotic sound.
localizations.hint_8: The inscription is your starting point. Using the pattern on machine 26, do all the calculation in the right order to get a new card number.
localizations.hint_10: The inscription is your starting point. Using the pattern on machine 26, do all the calculation in the right order to get a new card number.
localizations.hint_11: Rub the lamp until the genie appears.
localizations.hint_12: You will come back to see Scheherazade after finding a solution for her last tale.
localizations.hint_13: The chevrons of the desert cards are superimposed on those of this stone.
localizations.hint_20: The inscription is your starting point. Using the pattern on machine 26, do all the calculation in the right order to get a new card number.
localizations.hint_24: The first monkey plays flute, the second doesn't hear the tiger, and the third is dexterous.
localizations.hint_25: Look carefully at the lamp's side. Can't you see a number?
localizations.hint_26: A message is hiding among these slabs. Colors will help you to put them back in order.
localizations.hint_27: This magic carpet will enable you to go to different locations during this adventure.
localizations.hint_32: There's only one way to get to this window: by air!
localizations.hint_33: Superimpose the three carpets while paying attention to the strange white traces.
localizations.hint_34: Superimpose the three carpets while paying attention to the strange white traces.
localizations.hint_35: Superimpose the three carpets while paying attention to the strange white traces.
localizations.hint_40: How could you go to the souk from this window?
localizations.hint_44: Look closely at the lamp base.
localizations.hint_46: The chevron in the corner will be useful later.
localizations.hint_48: The black stars are the dead stars, and how many stars are there in total?
localizations.hint_50: How could you go the wealthy district from this window?
localizations.hint_52: Are you sure you counted ALL the stars?
localizations.hint_56: The chevron in the corner will be useful later.
localizations.hint_60: How could you go to the desert from this window?
localizations.hint_63_first: You should link all these symbols together. What's the right order?
localizations.hint_63: Whale, roc, cyclops, lotus, egg, diamond, bird-men. What number does this draw?
localizations.hint_64: Find the object to stitch your carpet.
localizations.hint_66: The chevron in the corner will be useful later.
localizations.hint_72: You'd either need a hand from the genie or the right tool to pick the lock.
localizations.hint_74_first: The cyclops copies your moves with a delay.
localizations.hint_74: Dart into the eastern wall if you want to outrun the cyclops.
localizations.hint_87: The chevron in the corner will be useful later.
localizations.hint_88: Look closely at the lamp lid.
localizations.hint_90_first: Only one letter of each line of the formula is important.
localizations.hint_90: Only read the first letter of each line of the formula. What number do they form?
localizations.hint_94: Scheherazade reveals a bracelet with a mysterious symbol to you.
localizations.machine_11: "Thank you, Master! Ashkan's magic is powerful, that's why I can't help you get the book but I will appear during your quest to help overcome obstacles. Take this modest gift, it will be more useful than it seems."
localizations.sesame_hint: It is Ali Baba's cave. A formula should open the way for you.
localizations.machine29_hint1: Only one symbol will open this book. But which one?
localizations.machine29_hint2: Once back to the Palace, look closely at Scheherazade's bracelet.
localizations.machine29_hint3: "Master, remember that it is not the purpose of the journey that matters, but the path traveled."
